tags.name: GeneCentric
tags.description: GeneCentric services of a proteome, where the set of genes and their products are grouped under a single canonical gene identifier

tags.name: Proteomes
tags.description: The proteomes service offers access to UniProtKB proteomes, allowing users to search for proteomes (including reference or redundant proteomes) using UniProt proteome identifiers, species names, or taxonomy identifiers

get.summary: Get proteome entry by a single upid.
get.description: Search Proteome entry by Proteome ID(upid) to return all data associated with that entry. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you

parameters.name: upid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the proteome entry

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

get.summary: Download proteome entries retrieved by a search query.
get.description: The stream endpoint uses a request query to return all entries associated with the search term in a single download. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Criteria to search proteomes. Advanced queries can be built with parentheses and conditionals such as AND, OR and NOT. List of valid search fields

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Specify field by which to sort results. List of valid sort fields

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

parameters.name: download
parameters.description: Specify <tt>true</tt> to download as file, default is <tt>false</tt>.

get.summary: Retrieve proteome entries by a search query.
get.description: The search endpoint uses a request query to return all entries associated with the search term in a paginated list of entries. Use ‘size’ to specify the number of entries per page of results. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Criteria to search proteomes. Advanced queries can be built with parentheses and conditionals such as AND, OR and NOT. List of valid search fields

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Specify field by which to sort results. List of valid sort fields

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Specify the number of entries per page of results (Pagination size). Default is 25, max is 500

get.summary: Retrieve a GeneCentric entry by a single UniProtKB accession.
get.description: Search GeneCentric entry by protein accession to return all data associated with that entry. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you

parameters.name: accession
parameters.description: Unique and stable identifier for each UniProtKB entry

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

get.summary: Retrieve GeneCentric entries of a single Proteome ID.
get.description: Search GeneCentric entry by Proteome ID to return all data associated with that entry. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you

parameters.name: upid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the proteome entry

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Specify the number of entries per page of results (Pagination size). Default is 25, max is 500

get.description: The stream endpoint uses a request query to return all entries associated with the search term in a single download. Specify <tt>fields</tt> to return only data for specific sections of that entry that are of interest to you

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Criteria to search GeneCentric. Advanced queries can be built with parentheses and conditionals such as AND, OR and NOT. List of valid search fields

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Specify field by which to sort results. List of valid sort fields

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of entry sections (fields) to be returned, separated by commas. List of valid fields

parameters.name: download
parameters.description: Specify <tt>true</tt> to download as file, default is <tt>false</tt>.
